title: microchloa ciliaris
intro: Microchloa ciliaris, also known as 'Habitat grass', is a type of grass species native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Microchloa ciliaris include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Microchloa ciliaris are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
